zh.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry是Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry和Blanche de Tingry的女兒，出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾。她和William de Boulogne至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1157年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry是Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry和Blanche de Tingry的女儿，出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾。她和William de Boulogne至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1157年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tingry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: from the Breton personal name Tangi, Tanguy (see Tanguy ).

variants.name: Tanguy
meanings: Breton: from the personal name Tanguy, originally a warrior's nickname, composed of tan ‘fire’ and ki ‘dog’. This surname is also found in Britain. Compare Tanguay .

variants.name: Tangney
meanings: Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Teangana ‘descendant of Teangana’, a personal name of unexplained etymology.

variants.name: Tingue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Delphin, Yvrose.
Americanized form of an unidentified surname, possibly Cornish   Tingey  .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry was born in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, France as the daughter of Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry and Blanche de Tingry. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with William de Boulogne. She died in 1157, in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry est née à Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, France, fille de Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry et Blanche de Tingry. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec William de Boulogne. Elle est décédée en 1157, à Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry wurde in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich, als Tochter von Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry und Blanche de Tingry geboren. Sie hatte mit William de Boulogne mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1157 in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry è nata il nel Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Francia come figlia di Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry e Blanche de Tingry. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con William de Boulogne. Morì nel 1157, nel Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingryはフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウルノンヴィルでHugues de Tingry seigneur de TingryとBlanche de Tingryの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam de Boulogneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1157年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスティングリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry(은)는 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부른빌에서 Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry(와)과 Blanche de Tingry의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William de Boulogne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1157년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 틴그리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry nasceu em Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, França filha de Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry e Blanche de Tingry. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com William de Boulogne. Ela faleceu em 1157, em Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry родилась в местности бурнонвилл, пас-де-калеи, Франция. Её родителей звали Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry и Blanche de Tingry. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от William de Boulogne. Она умерла в 1157 г. в местности тингри, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry nació en Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Francia como hija de Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry y Blanche de Tingry. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con William de Boulogne. Murió en 1157, en Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
